title: polystichum filix-mas var. paleaceum
intro: Polystichum filix-mas var. paleaceum, also known as the pale-stemmed lady fern, is a variety of the common lady fern plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The pale-stemmed lady fern is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antifungal properties. It can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in human use.
